title: Cut Out for This
caption: The face hole did not ask if she was ready. She was ready.

title: Lot of Romance
caption: Stunning Gulf sunset. Real couple. One Toyota Camry absolutely refusing to leave the frame. You had one job, parking lot.

title: Putting Your Best Foot Forward
caption: (And the other one too.) Feet up, Gulf out, fully unavailable to anything requiring a decision. The Gulf has agreed to hold all calls.

title: Just One Drink
caption: Studies show at least one person in this photo said 'just one drink.' Studies show they were wrong. The dartboard has no comment.

title: Cobble-Stone Cold Stunner
caption: The cobblestones were just sitting there, minding their own business. She made them iconic. They did not resist.

title: Getting Brass-y
caption: No photo, no alibi. She came, she saw, she documented it for the record. Notarized by vibe.

title: Bee-ach, Please
caption: She crouched in wet sand to write this. The Gulf read it. Nobody regrets anything.

title: Pair-a-dise Found
caption: Golden hour picked this table out of the entire patio. They showed up right on time. Second round incoming. No notes.

title: Rafter All That
caption: The ceiling beams have been holding this exact vibe for thirty years without acknowledgment. She walked in and immediately corrected that.

title: Two's Company
caption: Two people walked into a bar. This is not a setup. This is documentation. The punchline has yet to be formally agreed upon.

title: Yellow Flag, Green Light
caption: The restaurant said tropical. The drinks said yes. The color palette aggressively agreed with everyone.

title: Outdoor Policy
caption: Three chairs. Three drinks. The weather had a vote. The weather voted patio.

title: Out of Office, Into Gulf
caption: Feet up, Gulf out — again. Pass-a-Grille has a strict productivity policy and this is what full compliance looks like.

title: Four Stars, One Sign
caption: Four people. One sign. The sign won most photogenic. The humans are contesting this vigorously.

title: Making History, Briefly
caption: Historic district. Historic decision to stop in the middle of it and take a selfie. The cobblestones have seen worse.

title: The Neon Was Right
caption: The neon said Reef Donkey. The vibe said stay for one more. The neon was not wrong. It is never wrong.

title: Gilded and Unbothered
caption: Forty-five minutes to sunset. The Gulf is right there. She's reading something. The golden light is doing its absolute best.
tag: portrait of someone not watching the sunset

title: Ice Cream and Infrastructure
caption: He came for the Gulf view. He stayed for the crane. The ice cream was gone before either question could be resolved.

title: Working From Shore
caption: Her morning meeting was cancelled. The Gulf held the time slot. The flip-flops did not complain.

title: Two Bills at Crabby's
caption: They came for the view. They stayed for the crab. The Ryder Cup shirt came unbidden but stayed welcome.

title: The Crabby Trio
caption: Three people secured the window table. The window table included full Gulf view access. The Gulf was in peak form and it knew it.

title: Friends in High Places
caption: They requested the window table. It was available. The Gulf was performing. Some afternoons just cooperate from start to finish.

title: She Wore It Well
caption: The lobster bib is technically optional. Her expression suggests she disagrees.

title: Committed
caption: He didn't come all the way to Crabby Bills to make eye contact. The crab platter had his full and undivided attention.

title: All Hands on Deck
caption: Every tray loaded, every bib deployed, the Gulf right outside the window deciding whether to feel jealous of the seafood inside.

title: Go Blue, Stay Beachy
caption: Michigan hat, Florida tan, papel picado in the background. She's managing multiple allegiances and pulling it off.

title: Parking Lot Panorama
caption: The beer was cold. The light was perfect. The parking lot sent its full roster to participate in a sunset it was not invited to. Still ten out of ten.
